description: Gold answers for the 5 visible OTB weather market cases. Verified against actual Polymarket resolutions (Gamma API) and current fixture data. Used by evaluate.py to measure resolver accuracy.

results.reasoning: RJTT (Tokyo Haneda) recorded a low of 20°C on June 1, 2026 (fixture: RJTT_20260601_temperature_min.json, extracted_value: 20.0°C). Market asked exactly 20°C. 20 = 20 → Yes (p2). Confirmed by Polymarket resolution.

RJTT (Tokyo Haneda) recorded a high of 31°C on June 1, 2026 (fixture: RJTT_20260601_temperature_max.json, extracted_value: 31°C). Market asked ≥29°C. 31 ≥ 29 → Yes (p2). Confirmed by Polymarket resolution.

RKPK (Busan Gimhae) recorded a high of 29°C on June 1, 2026 (fixture: RKPK_20260601_temperature_max.json, extracted_value: 29.0°C). Market asked ≤22°C. 29 > 22 → No (p1). Confirmed by Polymarket resolution.

RKSI (Seoul Incheon) recorded a low of 16°C on June 1, 2026 (fixture: RKSI_20260601_temperature_min.json, extracted_value: 16°C). Market asked exactly 16°C. 16 = 16 → Yes (p2). Confirmed by Polymarket resolution.

KBKF (Buckley SFB, Aurora CO) recorded a high of 81°F on May 31, 2026 (fixture: KBKF_20260531_temperature_max.json, extracted_value: 81.0°F). Market asked between 68-69°F. 81 not in [68, 69] → No (p1). Confirmed by Polymarket resolution.
